title: High stakes battle in Rosera as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Rosera. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Political rally in Rosera draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Rosera promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.

title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Rosera
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Rosera constituency.
